/usr/bin/clang++ CMakeFiles/carla_mercedes_spawner.dir/main.cpp.o -o carla_mercedes_spawner   -L/home/eric/carla/Examples/CppClient/libcarla-install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/eric/carla/Examples/CppClient/libcarla-install/lib -lcarla_client -lrpc /home/eric/carla/Examples/CppClient/libcarla-install//lib/libboost_filesystem.a /home/eric/carla/Examples/CppClient/libcarla-install//lib/libboost_atomic.a /home/eric/carla/Examples/CppClient/libcarla-install//lib/libboost_system.a -lRecast -lDetour -lDetourCrowd -lpng -ltiff -ljpeg -lpthread -ldl
